features.featureTitle: Build a fixed top navigation header with the Sankalp Marg Foundation logo (use generated logo asset), navigation links to Home, Scheme Info, and Contact sections, a clickable phone number (7562038551) displayed in orange, and a 'Register' button styled as an orange rounded pill.

Build a full-width hero section with an orange-to-white gradient background. Left side: a badge labeled 'Sankalp Marg Foundation', a large headline reading 'A New Pledge for the Poor — Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana', a supporting paragraph about free education, healthcare, and employment training for underprivileged families, an 'Apply Now' orange CTA button, and a green 'Call Now' button linking to tel:7562038551. Right side: display the generated hero image.

Build a services section titled 'Our Key Services' with four cards in a responsive grid: (1) Free Healthcare — better treatment and free medicines for every poor family; (2) Quality Education — free books and scholarships for children; (3) Farmer Welfare — financial and technical support for farmers; (4) Employment Mission — training and livelihood support for women. Each card has a relevant Font Awesome icon in orange, a bold title, and a short description. Cards have a hover effect that highlights the border in orange and scales the icon.

Build a dark footer (slate-900 background) with three columns: (1) Logo (inverted white version) with a tagline about the foundation's commitment to the underprivileged; (2) Quick links: Home, Scheme Info, Privacy Policy; (3) Contact details with icons — email: vishalkumar841456@gmail.com, phone: 7562038551, address: New Delhi, India. Include a copyright line '© 2026 Sankalp Marg Foundation. All Rights Reserved.'

Apply a consistent visual theme across the entire page: orange (#ea580c) as the primary brand color, slate-900 for dark sections, white and slate-50 for light backgrounds, bold black headings, and rounded card/button styling. Use smooth scroll behavior and subtle hover transitions throughout.
